item.title: Activity digest — proactive daily summary and monitoring
steps: Enhanced DigestReport type with pendingApprovals, cronRuns, doctorWarnings fields
Added readPendingApprovals() and parseCronHistory() collector functions
Updated generateDigest() to pull from approval queue and cron history
Added friendly 'No activity recorded yet' empty state in formatter
Added pending approvals, cron runs, and doctor warnings sections to table format
Updated tests: 28 tests covering all new functionality
Verified heartbeat cron hook wiring (PART B)
acceptanceCriteria: clawhq digest shows meaningful summary from available agent data
No data shows friendly 'no activity recorded yet' message
